CustomField.formula: IF( Experts_doc__c , IF( ISPICKVAL(Case__r.preferd_chanal_case__c,'Email') ,"ואוצ'ר עבור התור: " & "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/VOUCHER_EXPERTS?fld130="& formtitan_id_2__c, "https://"&$Setup.Form_Titan_Domain__c.Domain__c&"/VOUCHER_EXPERTS?fld130="& formtitan_id_2__c) ,'')
CustomField.label: formtitan kit experts link
